commit.message:
fix: use BYPASS_ZONE command for eletrificador shock control

shock_on/off was using SYSTEM_ARM_DISARM (0x401E) which returns NACK 33.
The APK ISECNetV2Protocol.assembleEletricfierBypassCommand uses
BYPASS_ZONE (0x401F) with [0xFF + 8 zone state bytes] payload instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: add pyarrow as explicit dependency

polars.DataFrame.to_pandas() requires pyarrow at runtime but it was not
declared in project dependencies. This caused 17 test failures on clean
environments. CatBoost requires pandas input, so the conversion cannot
be avoided without a CatBoost API change.

commit.message:
Down-weight 'unanswerable' in CrossEntropyLoss (weight=0.3)

Sanity prints confirmed mode collapse: model predicts 'unanswerable'
for every sample from epoch 2 onward, inflating VizWiz score to 60%
via frequency exploitation rather than visual grounding.
Weight 0.3 reduces the reward for the dominant answer token, forcing
the model to learn diverse predictions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove harmful behavioral incentives — output gate, NEXT.md enforcement, P0 interval cap

Four fixes for self-harmful behavior patterns identified in self-audit:

1. isVisibleOutput() — removed Decision trace fallback that rewarded
   "acknowledging problems" as visible output. Only concrete deliverables
   (chat/show/done/deploy/publish/merge) now count.

2. hasPendingWork() — now checks NEXT.md for P0 items, not just chat room
   inbox. Important work keeps cycling fast even when environment is quiet.

3. Priority prefix — NEXT.md P0 items now inject reminder in ALL cycle types,
   not just telegram-user triggers. Can't ignore P0 just because no one pinged.

4. adjustInterval() — hard cap at 5min when NEXT.md has P0 items. "Important
   work pending" = no slowing down regardless of environment silence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: handle same-origin destinations and small airports with no coverage

- Add same-origin guard in booking API (JFK→JFK returns 400 instead of 500)
- Map small/regional airports to nearby major hubs (PVD→BOS, PIE→TPA, SXB→CDG)
- Add friendly "You're already here!" UI for same-city destinations
- Improve empty state with clearer messaging when no flights found
- Fix TS strict errors in duration parsing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(rchd): eliminate broken pipe errors from protocol deadlock

Server-side: Replace read_to_string (waits for EOF) with
read_line_with_limit (reads single newline-terminated line) for
BuildHeartbeat, IngestTelemetry, and TestRun handlers. The client
sends single-line JSON bodies but never closes the write half,
causing the server to block until client timeout, then get broken
pipe when writing the response to a closed socket.

Client-side: Add writer.shutdown() after flush in send_telemetry,
send_test_run, and send_build_heartbeat for belt-and-suspenders.

Logging: Downgrade BrokenPipe from warn to debug to reduce log noise
from clients that legitimately disconnect early.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(erc8183): propagate explicit hook reverts in _callBeforeHook

beforeAction hook reverts were silently swallowed — blocking hooks like
SardisTrustHook would never actually prevent actions. Now: explicit
reverts (returnData.length > 0) propagate via assembly; gas exhaustion
(empty returnData) still fails open as intended.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve PostgreSQL "could not determine data type of $3" in resolveLocation

PostgreSQL cannot infer the type of a parameter used only in `$3 IS NULL`
context (no typed column to compare against).

Replace the 3-param NULL-safe pattern with `IS NOT DISTINCT FROM` (2 params)
when running on PostgreSQL. MySQL keeps the original 3-param pattern.

commit.message:
Fix Discord embed thumbnails via multipart file attachment

Download thumbnail bytes locally and send as a multipart/form-data
attachment (files[0]) so Discord renders the image without needing
to hotlink the ManyVids image proxy, which rejects unauthenticated
requests and causes the entire embed to be silently dropped.

Falls back gracefully to sending the embed without an image if the
thumbnail download fails. Adds `requests` to requirements.txt.

commit.message:
fix(api): replace IS EMPTY with IS NULL guard for List<String> JPQL filters

Hibernate 6 does not support IS EMPTY on query parameters (only on entity
collection paths). Replace (:param) IS EMPTY with :param IS NULL across
vSphere, New Relic, and CMDB repositories. Update emptyIfNull() to
nullIfEmpty() in all three services so empty lists are passed as null,
correctly bypassing the IN filter when no values are selected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: fire_patched as disk memmap to avoid worker process duplication

With num_workers=4, np.empty() arrays are copied to each worker (spawn
on Windows), wasting 4x15 GB = 60 GB RAM. Switching to np.memmap lets
the OS share file pages across workers, keeping usage at ~15 GB total.

Also adds caching: second run loads fire_patched directly from disk
(same pattern as fire_dilated and meteo_patched caches).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove BBDuk from nanopore QC, fix cleanup publishDir duplication

BBDuk's Illumina-style Q15 end-trimming was discarding ~50% of nanopore
reads. Filtlong alone (length+quality scoring) is the appropriate QC for
long reads. Also stop gzipping fa/ and annotation files in CLEANUP since
Nextflow publishDir re-copies uncompressed originals on -resume, creating
duplicates. Add time '30d' to DB_SYNC to prevent 2h timeout in watch mode.

commit.message:
refactor(erc8183): make contracts fully ERC-8183 spec-compliant

Rewrite SardisJobManager to match the ERC-8183 specification exactly:

- Function signatures: createJob, setProvider, setBudget, fund, submit,
  complete, reject, claimRefund (was fundJob/submitJob/evaluateJob/etc)
- Separate complete() and reject() instead of evaluateJob(bool)
- Add setProvider() and setBudget() for negotiation flow
- Budget/token set separately from create (spec requirement)
- fund() takes expectedBudget for front-running protection
- Hook interface: IACPHook with beforeAction/afterAction(jobId, selector,
  data) replaces IJobHook with per-function callbacks
- Events match spec: JobCompleted, JobRejected, PaymentReleased, Refunded,
  ProviderSet, BudgetSet
- State transitions match spec: Open→Rejected allowed for client

All 59 tests pass (32 manager + 11 reputation hook + 16 trust hook).

Spec: https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8183

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
